provenance_defaults.source: TDM reference (NHS Tayside/Ninewells), intervals corroborated against AMH
provenance_defaults.authored_by: claude-fable-5 (agent, draft transcription of cited source)

records.rationale: NTI anticonvulsant; autoinduction and dose-dependent toxicity; TDM guides dosing
NTI calcineurin inhibitor; nephrotoxicity vs rejection; transplant-specific targets
NTI cardiac glycoside; toxicity risk, potentiated by hypokalaemia
records.monitoring_hint: sample >=6 h post-dose; check potassium concurrently

records.rationale: NTI mood stabiliser; narrow window; renal and thyroid monitoring
NTI antimetabolite; marrow and hepatic toxicity; high-dose needs level-guided rescue
NTI anticonvulsant; saturable (non-linear) kinetics; small dose changes shift levels sharply
records.monitoring_hint: timing not critical; beware early levels after loading

records.rationale: NTI calcineurin inhibitor; nephrotoxicity vs rejection
NTI methylxanthine; arrhythmia/seizure risk in toxicity
records.monitoring_hint: peak 6 h post SR dose; trough pre-dose

records.rationale: NTI aminoglycoside; nephrotoxicity and ototoxicity; timed levels essential
records.monitoring_hint: timed peak/trough per Adult Antibiotic Policy
timed trough per Adult Antibiotic Policy
